criteria_results.description: ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx handleFileChange calls POST /api/files for each selected photo and dispatches a string matching /^\/api\/files\/[a-f0-9-]+$/ as photoDataUrl — never a data:image base64 string
criteria_results.evidence: In client/src/components/editor/ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx, handleFileChange (lines 37-65) calls uploadFile.mutateAsync (line 51) which performs a POST to /api/files. The dispatch (line 58) uses result.url, which is the server-side file path string, instead of the compressed base64 string.

criteria_results.description: ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx imports and calls useUploadFile from @client/src/hooks/useProjects.ts and useDocument from @client/src/lib/editor-context.tsx to obtain docState.projectId
criteria_results.evidence: ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx imports useDocument (line 2) and useUploadFile (line 11). Both hooks are initialized at lines 31-32, and state.projectId is passed to the upload call at line 53.

criteria_results.description: ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx contains a local helper function (e.g. dataUrlToFile) that converts a base64 data URL string to a File object for upload
criteria_results.evidence: The dataUrlToFile helper function is defined at lines 19-28 and invoked at line 48 to convert the compressed base64 image into a File object suitable for FormData upload.

criteria_results.description: useExport.ts toDataUrl helper branch for '/api/files/' strings uses fetch(content) followed by FileReader.readAsDataURL, identical in structure to the existing 'blob:' branch
criteria_results.evidence: In client/src/hooks/useExport.ts, the toDataUrl helper (lines 28-56) now handles both 'blob:' and '/api/files/' prefixes (line 38). It correctly uses fetch, response.blob(), and FileReader.readAsDataURL to embed external photos as base64 in the ZIP bundle.

criteria_results.description: The existing 'blob:' branch in useExport.ts toDataUrl is not modified
criteria_results.evidence: The logic for 'blob:' in useExport.ts (line 38) has been combined with the '/api/files/' check, preserving its exact functional structure and internal implementation.

criteria_results.description: Photos with legacy base64 data URL values still render correctly in the gallery (backward compat: img src accepts both data: URLs and /api/files/ paths)
criteria_results.evidence: In client/src/components/editor/ObjectPhotoGallery.tsx, img tags (lines 115 and 147) use src={photo} and src={photos[lightboxIndex]} directly. Since the browser natively handles both data: URIs and relative paths, backward compatibility is maintained without code changes.

suggestions: The dataUrlToFile helper uses atob(), which might be deprecated or behave inconsistently with very large strings in some environments; consider using a more robust buffer-based approach if photo sizes increase significantly.
